post.subject: Spending spree!
post.body: Just back from a two day spending spree! Ive spent £150 in the last 2 days, mainly on clothes. 1 dvd, 1 cd, and father's day present. Was so much fun!! Also played table tennis and pool (and lost as usual). I didnt realise shopping could be so much fun. All the trying on and 'what you think? 'this look good on me?'. Also saw Batman Begins today - so much better than i expected! Life is peachy.
